title: Key Bind Presets
description: This mod will allow you to have multiple sets of key binds and Toggles between them easily
body:
keybind presets is a mod that allows you to have multiple sets of key binds. 
![You're able to save a set of keybinds and then view each set of keybinds that you have ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/458bb635f8cd3c1c6c7c9f0aa1034208b615450a_0.webp)

you can also rename and set different keys to switch between your keybind presets easily


You're able to load each set of keybinds with one button on your keyboard.
